C001.text:
DOCK SCHEDULE SUMMARY — Mon Apr 14, 2026

Good morning. Three appointments on the board today:

• APPT-20260414-001 | 07:00–08:00 | Dock 1 | Alloy Direct Supply (SUP-0041) | XPO Logistics | POs: MER-PO-8812, MER-PO-8813 | ⚠️ Safety-Critical (DS family) — COC + MTR required on arrival
• APPT-20260414-002 | 09:00–10:00 | Dock 2 | Precision Gear Works (SUP-0117) | Yellow Freight | PO: MER-PO-8845 | Standard (GR family)
• APPT-20260414-003 | 10:30–11:30 | Dock 3 | Coastal Fasteners LLC (SUP-0089) | R&L Carriers | POs: MER-PO-8820, 8821, 8822 | Standard (HW family, multi-line)

Also flagging: NCR-2026-0031 Major response deadline (Precision Gear Works) is today. Carrier claim for REC-20260409-005 must be filed today. Concealed damage window for REC-20260404-002 closes today.

@cyablonski heads up on the DS shipment — will need photo documentation of all pallets before offload begins.
Copy. Dock 1 staged and ready. I'll have the crew on standby at 06:50 for the XPO truck. Will photograph every pallet before we touch anything.

ARRIVAL ON TIME: APPT-20260414-001, Alloy Direct Supply, Dock 1, PO #MER-PO-8812 / MER-PO-8813. Cleared to unload.

Driver has COC and MTR in hand — both reference heat number H-2026-0441. Proceeding to PO match.
Unloading started. 4 pallets, approx 2,100 lb. Photographing each. Will post count when offload is complete.

Offload complete. Pallet count: 4 of 4. Condition: Tier 0 — no visible damage. Piece count on pallet 3 looks a little light — flagging for your count verification before I send the crew to the next door.

Confirmed — pallet 3 short. Running quantity variance now. PO MER-PO-8812 called for 144 units DS-7740, received 141. Variance: -2.1%. Safety-critical Band 1 short ship → NCR Major required per SOP §14.1. Will open NCR-2026-0035 within the 2-hour window.

@tbrandt flagging this — DS-family short ship, will need your eyes on the heat number match before putaway auth.
Got it. I'll come to the dock after the 08:30 stand-up. Don't authorize putaway on MER-PO-8812 until I've verified H-2026-0441 against the MTR.

PUTAWAY AUTHORIZED: REC-20260414-001 | PO MER-PO-8813 (DS-7741, 144/144 units, Tier 0, Tier 0 docs) | Heat H-2026-0441 verified by Theo Brandt. Quarantine flag applied to MER-PO-8812 pending NCR-2026-0035 resolution. @mortiz please hold MER-PO-8812 lot in quarantine bay.
Quarantine hold confirmed on MER-PO-8812 / DS-7740 / 141 units. Tagged in inventory_master.xlsx. Let me know when NCR resolves.
ARRIVAL ON TIME: APPT-20260414-002, Precision Gear Works, Dock 2, PO #MER-PO-8845. Cleared to unload.
ARRIVAL ON TIME: APPT-20260414-003, Coastal Fasteners LLC, Dock 3, PO #MER-PO-8820 / 8821 / 8822. Cleared to unload.
Coastal truck has 6 pallets, mixed HW parts across all three POs. Packing slip matches. No visible damage. Counting now.

Hey team — just finished the HW-3305 re-inspection with Theo on REC-20260407-003. Found damage on 12 of the lock nuts from the Coastal Fasteners shipment that came in April 7. Looks like some units took impact, consistent with movement in transit. All 800 units are still in HW-1 Bin 1D as received. Flagging for the Coordinator.

PUTAWAY AUTHORIZED: REC-20260414-003, REC-20260414-004, REC-20260414-005 | POs MER-PO-8820 / 8821 / 8822 — all lines within auto-accept threshold (variances: +0.2%, 0.0%, -0.3%). Tier 0 condition. Docs complete. @mortiz proceed to standard rack locations.
PUTAWAY AUTHORIZED: REC-20260414-006 | PO MER-PO-8845 (GR-family, 200/200 units, Tier 0). Packing slip clean, no NCR required. @mortiz GR parts to standard staging.

END-OF-SHIFT HANDOFF — Mon Apr 14, 2026 | Jordan V. → Night Crew

✅ APPT-20260414-001: REC-20260414-001 complete. MER-PO-8813 putaway authorized. MER-PO-8812 in quarantine (NCR-2026-0035 opened, Major, DS short ship). NCR letter to Alloy Direct Supply due by 07:05 CST tomorrow.
✅ APPT-20260414-002: REC-20260414-002 complete. Putaway authorized.
✅ APPT-20260414-003: REC-20260414-003 complete. Putaway authorized.
⚠️ Quarantine Bay: MER-PO-8812 (DS-7740, 141 units) — hold until NCR-2026-0035 resolves. @mortiz confirmed.
⚠️ NCR-2026-0031 (Precision Gear Works, Major): No supplier response received by deadline today. Notified @jpark per §14.5 — escalation in progress.
⚠️ Carrier claim for REC-20260409-005 filed with Yellow Freight at 13:00. Reference #YF-CLM-88214. Logged in receiving_log.xlsx.

No open receipts. All workbooks saved and closed.

C002.text: Escalation notice — NCR-2026-0031 (Precision Gear Works, SUP-0117, Major): 10-business-day supplier response window expired today without response. This is SUP-0117's second missed NCR response in 60 days. Per §15.3, repeat-offender threshold is being evaluated. @evelasquez flagging for your awareness — Procurement will formally notify the supplier of escalation status.
Acknowledged. Keep me in the loop on their response. If they miss a third Major NCR window, we move to a status downgrade conversation with @wfinch. Document everything.

C004.text: Good morning Meridian. Reminder that the Q1 internal quality audit window closes today (Apr 14). If Theo's team has reached out to you for records, please prioritize those requests — they have until EOD today. Thanks to everyone in Receiving and Quality for their cooperation this quarter.

Thanks Walter. Q1 audit wrapping up today. I'll have a summary for leadership by end of week. Nothing alarming in the sample — a few timing breach self-reports that were handled correctly, and one quarantine release that needs a minor notes correction (coordinating with @mortiz on that). Overall the receiving records are in good shape.

C005.text: Q1 audit is in its final day (Apr 14). Outstanding records requests: REC-20260318-004 (COC file path) and REC-20260225-009 (NCR closure timestamp). @jordanv — can you pull these today and email to audit.meridian@gearsystems.com with subject lines AUDIT RESPONSE: REC-[ID]?

On it. I'll pull both records now. REC-20260318-004 — COC is in packing_slips\2026\03\ per §5.4 naming. REC-20260225-009 — NCR closure timestamp is in ncr_log row 14. Emailing both within the hour. Note: I spotted a minor discrepancy in REC-20260225-009 — the NCR closure date in the log shows 03/05 but the email chain shows 03/04. Have not modified the row per §19.3.2. Flagging it in the audit response email.

Perfect — that's exactly the right call. Don't touch the row until audit closes. I'll note the discrepancy as an audit finding (minor) and we'll follow §13.6 cross-shift correction after I close the audit today.
